history.qwen_observation: The UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 step caused a compilation error due to an API mismatch in elasticsearch-rest-client (code passes HttpClient 5 HttpHost, but the upgraded dependency expects HttpClient 4).
history.qwen_rationale: Remove the Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade step. The project is on Spring Boot 3.1.4, which typically compiles on JDK 21 despite official matrix recommendations. The framework upgrade introduced a transitive dependency conflict that breaks the build; reverting to the pure JDK migration template avoids this regression and aligns with the principle of only upgrading frameworks when strictly necessary.
